title: A Registry for What Grep Can't Find
description: Some load-bearing facts are invisible to search — the code compiles and the behavior is still wrong. Hold them in one registry, enforce the mechanical ones in CI, and split why / decided / currently-true. The technique, quoted from a real 25-entry registry.
cardDesc: Facts grep can't surface, held in one registry and enforced in CI — the conclusion, pre-paid once.
